com.intrasoft.icarus.revenuemanagement.registration.rest.dto.obligation.Obligation
: 
{type: "object",…}
description
: 
"### Validations for both Calendar and Non-Calendar Obligations:\n - Revenue Type Registration exists\n - Revenue Type Registration should be in either ACTIVATED or DEACTIVATED status\n - Revenue Type Registration can not be updated\n - Related Revenue Type Category must be PERIODIC for Calendar and ADHOC for Non-Calendar Obligations\n - Obligation has either Revenue Calendar Period Action (Calendar case) or Obligation Action (Non-Calendar case)\n - End Date cannot be before Start Date\n - Due Date cannot be before From Date\n - Grace Date cannot be before Due Date unless the related Revenue Type has its Grace Date Extension field populated\n - Obligation Start/End Dates should be within the selected Revenue Type Registration Start/End Dates\n - From Date is only valid for Filing Action\n- Update in Obligation Action can occur only when Obligation Action is Active\n- Cannot remove Obligation Actions when updating\n### Validations for Calendar Obligations:\n - Obligation Calendar exists, if provided\n - Revenue Calendar Period Action exists, if provided\n - If Obligation Calendar is provided, then Revenue Calendar Period Action should be provided too\n - Obligation actions are according to Revenue Calendar Period Actions of the Revenue Calendar Period\n - Obligation with the same Calendar Period and same Revenue Type Registration is not allowed\n - Revenue Calendar should be among the effective Calendars\n - Revenue Calendar Period should be among the effective Calendar Periods\n - Obligation Start/End Date is according to Calendar Period\n - Obligation Start/End Date is according to Revenue Calendar Period and Revenue Type Registration, more specifically:\n   - if _Revenue Type Registration End Date_ < _Revenue Calendar Period End Date_, then _Obligation End Date_ = _Revenue Type Registration End Date_\n   - If _Revenue Type Registration Calendar Effective Date_ > _Revenue Calendar Period Start Date_, then _Obligation Start Date_ = _Revenue Type Registration Calendar Effective Date_\n - The Obligation Action Due Date must be after the Revenue Calendar Period Action Due Date\n"

/obligations/quick-create
: 
{post: {tags: ["Obligation"],…}}
post

{tags: ["Obligation"],…}
description
: 
"This endpoint creates a **Revenue Type Registration** and a related ADHOC Obligation along with a PAYMENT **Obligation Action** at once.\n\nRegarding the _Revenue Type Registration_, it creates and activates one with following details:\n- **Party Role** the provided one (coming from request body),\n- **Revenue Type** is a systemic one that comes from Reference Data codelist SYSTEM_PARAMETERS and codelist item EXCESS_REVENUE_TYPE\n- **Start Date** is today\n\n>_Note: In case there is already an existing non-cancelled Revenue Type Registration with the previous details, the system uses that one._\n\nRegarding the _ADHOC Obligation_, it creates and returns one a PAYMENT Obligation Action with:\n- **Revenue Type Registration** the one from the previous step.\n- **Start Date** today.\n- **Due Date** 1000 years from today.\n\n>_Note: In case there is already the aforementioned Obligation Action the system returns that one._"
